returns._0: The number of decimals for the token.

decimals(uint256).notice: External view function for retrieving the decimals of an ERC6909 token. Returns the decimals of the underlying token, falling back to a default if needed.

name(uint256).notice: External view function for generating the name of an ERC6909 token. Combines "Compact" with the underlying token's name, falling back to a default if needed.

symbol(uint256).notice: External view function for generating the symbol of an ERC6909 token. Combines a handshake emoji with the underlying token's symbol, falling back to a default if needed.

uri(uint256).notice: External view function for generating the URI for a resource lock's ERC6909 token. The URI is derived from the lock's details and token identifier.
